title: anatherum bourgaei
intro: Anatherum bourgaei, also known as the Giant Fescue, is a type of perennial grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory compounds. The health benefits of Anatherum bourgaei include its ability to relieve coughs, reduce fever, and soothe digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Anatherum bourgaei typically involve drying and processing the leaves and stems into teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use.
